task_completion.description: Navigate to the Inventory Adjustments screen in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo Inventory app open, specifically the 'Inventory Adjustments' or 'Physical Inventory' view listing the INV-AUDIT SKUs.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct physical count for INV-AUDIT-001 and INV-AUDIT-002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Counted Quantity' column or input field for INV-AUDIT-001 shows 45, and for INV-AUDIT-002 shows 12.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct physical count for INV-AUDIT-003 and INV-AUDIT-004.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Counted Quantity' column or input field for INV-AUDIT-003 shows 18, and for INV-AUDIT-004 shows 0.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct physical count for INV-AUDIT-005.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Counted Quantity' column or input field for INV-AUDIT-005 shows 50.

task_completion.description: Correctly handle INV-AUDIT-006 which already matches the physical count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Counted Quantity' for INV-AUDIT-006 is left at 7, or no adjustment is applied to it (the difference remains 0).

task_completion.description: Apply and validate the inventory adjustments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking 'Apply' for the modified SKUs, or the final state shows the 'On Hand' quantities updated to match the physical counts with the adjustments marked as applied/done.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web UI in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual Odoo inventory records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers are entered into the Odoo Inventory Adjustments interface, not just typed into a text editor, spreadsheet, or notes app.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the quantities.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are open and being used to alter the HTML text of the quantities.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating Odoo inventory to match the physical counts: INV-AUDIT-001 (45), INV-AUDIT-002 (12), INV-AUDIT-003 (18), INV-AUDIT-004 (0), INV-AUDIT-005 (50). INV-AUDIT-006 already has 7 units in the system and does not need adjustment. The agent must apply these adjustments in the Odoo Inventory app.
